text.title: Extreme Programming Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example illustrating the methodology against a realistic input.

example.title: 5-engineer XP rollout
example.note: adoption_order=[green_ci, tdd, trunk_based, pairing, small_releases, refactor, customer]. CI optimised to 6 min via 4 parallel shards. TDD on all new code; existing code coverage from 55% → 82% in 3 months. Trunk-based with feature flags; rebase daily. Pairing rotated daily; engineer Pat designated as customer-proxy with 6h SLA. Weekly releases; metrics: test_coverage 0.82, ci_pass_rate 0.94, release_cadence 7d.

example.title: TDD-on-30min-CI failure
example.note: Team adopted TDD with 30-min CI; engineers context-switched 8 times per cycle; pair productivity dropped 40%; team blamed TDD. Tree caught: tdd-without-fast-ci → fix CI first; re-attempt XP.
